metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "bird":
              return f"The {obj.lower()} is a bird found in {subj}"
          # Generic fallback
          return f"is {obj}"
with:
  if p == "bird":
              return f"The {obj.lower()} is a bird found in {subj}"
          if p == "leader":
              # Subject is the entity being led, object is the leader
              return f"{obj} is the leader of {subj}"
          # Generic fallback
          return f"is {obj}"
